name: Jannik Sinner
recentForm: Dominant season with Australian Open and US Open titles. Consistent top form on hard courts.

name: Novak Djokovic
recentForm: Still competitive at 37, reaching Grand Slam semis. Legendary consistency continues.

name: Carlos Alcaraz
recentForm: Won Roland Garros and Wimbledon back-to-back. Explosive power and shot variety.

name: Alexander Zverev
recentForm: Strong Masters results, reaching multiple finals. Still seeking first Grand Slam.

name: Daniil Medvedev
recentForm: Consistent presence in late rounds of Slams. Reached Australian Open final.

name: Andrey Rublev
recentForm: Solid results on hard courts, but struggling in Grand Slams beyond QF.

name: Hubert Hurkacz
recentForm: Big server making deep runs. Breakthrough at Masters level.

name: Casper Ruud
recentForm: Clay court specialist with improving hard court results.

name: Alex de Minaur
recentForm: Quick and relentless from the baseline. Best season on tour.

name: Grigor Dimitrov
recentForm: Veteran finding late-career resurgence. Elegant one-handed backhand.

name: Stefanos Tsitsipas
recentForm: Working to recapture top-5 form. Monte Carlo title shows potential.

name: Taylor Fritz
recentForm: Breakout year with US Open final and career-high ranking.

name: Tommy Paul
recentForm: Steady climb up the rankings. Strong on hard courts.

name: Ben Shelton
recentForm: Young power hitter with massive serve. Exciting future ahead.

name: Holger Rune
recentForm: Talented but inconsistent. Flashes of brilliance in big tournaments.

name: Ugo Humbert
recentForm: Left-handed serve and volley game. Rising on fast courts.

name: Sebastian Korda
recentForm: Son of Petr Korda, showing Grand Slam pedigree.

name: Nicolas Jarry
recentForm: Powerful game with career-best results this season.

name: Karen Khachanov
recentForm: Big-hitting baseline game. Olympic silver medalist.

name: Felix Auger-Aliassime
recentForm: Former prodigy working to fulfill immense potential.
